TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Norman_Black, title = Norman_Black, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norman_Black} }

S.FORM: Norman Black sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Norman Black, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Norman Black sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Norman Black, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: norman βlaʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, norman βlaʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
